scene_1.visual_plan: Begin with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera, utilizing natural handheld motion to establish an authentic UGC feel, with a shallow depth of field that keeps the model in sharp focus against a soft, neutral background. Immediately after the first spoken line, cut to a close-up shot of the product now in right hand, holding the bottle near the face to allow for clear tagging of the element, with steady framing to highlight the product label. Transition back to the medium shot as the model continues the narrative, then introduce a secondary cinematic angle showing the product in hand from a slightly elevated perspective, emphasizing the texture and quality of the serum. Conclude the scene with the model holding the product visible near the chest area in the medium shot, delivering the final line with a confident, direct-to-camera gaze.
scene_1.dialogue: まつげケア、もっと早く始めればよかったと後悔しています。敏感で弱いまつげに悩み、いろいろ試したのにほとんど伸びなかったからです。そんな時、ETERNAL EYELASH Premiumに出会い、正直、最初から違いました。まつげエクステをしていても刺激がなく、まつげは目に見えてふさふさになり、強くなりました。本当に長持ちする良いまつげが欲しいなら、これは間違いなく画期的なアイテムです。
